title: São José do Rio Preto、SP — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: São José do Rio Preto、SPの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

São José do Rio PretoはSPにある人口480,393の都市です。A rapidly growing agribusiness and service hub in northwestern São Paulo, known for its quality of life and medical services.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
